mapper.update:
SELECT MAX(SEQ_CURRVAL)+1 FROM TBL_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
UPDATE TBL_SEQUENCES SET SEQ_CURRVAL = #{seq_currval} WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
mapper.select:
SELECT book_report.UBR_CODE AS ubr_code , book_report.UBR_UM_CODE AS ubr_um_code , book_report.UBR_TITLE AS ubr_title , book_report.UBR_CONTENT AS ubr_content , book_report.UBR_IS_OPEN AS ubr_is_open , (SELECT COUNT(UBRC_CODE) FROM TBL_BOOK_REPORT_COMMENT WHERE UBRC_UBR_CODE = book_report.UBR_CODE AND UBRC_TYPE = 'Y') AS ubr_like , DATE_FORMAT(book_report.UBR_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS ubr_regdate , contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , member_master.UM_USERID AS um_userid , book_report_comment.UBRC_TYPE AS ubrc_type , book_report_comment.UBRC_CODE AS ubrc_code FROM TBL_BOOK_REPORT book_report LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON book_report.UBR_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master ON book_report.UBR_UM_CODE = member_master.UM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOOK_REPORT_COMMENT book_report_comment ON book_report.UBR_CODE = book_report_comment.UBRC_UBR_CODE AND book_report_comment.UBRC_UM_CODE = #{um_code} WHERE book_report.UBR_CODE = #{ubr_code}
AND book_report.UBR_UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOOK_REPORT_COMMENT ( UBRC_CODE, UBRC_UBR_CODE, UBRC_UM_CODE, UBRC_TYPE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UBRC',LPAD(#{ubrc_code},11,'0')), #{ubrc_ubr_code}, #{um_code}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT UBRC_CODE AS ubrc_code , UBRC_UBR_CODE AS ubrc_ubr_code , UBRC_UM_CODE AS ubrc_um_code , UBRC_TYPE AS ubrc_type , UBRC_CONTENT AS ubrc_content , DATE_FORMAT(UBRC_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS ubrc_regdate FROM TBL_BOOK_REPORT_COMMENT WHERE UBRC_UBR_CODE = #{ubrc_ubr_code} AND UBRC_UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_BOOK_REPORT SET UBR_TYPE = '0'
, UBR_LIKE = UBR_LIKE+1
, UBR_LIKE = UBR_LIKE-1
WHERE UBR_CODE = #{ubrc_ubr_code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTENT_DISCUSSION ( UCD_CODE, UCD_UCM_CODE, UCD_UIS_CODE, UCD_UM_CODE, UCD_UM_USERID, UCD_COMMENT ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UCD',LPAD(#{ucd_code},18,'0')), #{ucd_ucm_code}, #{ucd_uis_code}, #{ucd_um_code}, #{ucd_um_userid}, #{ucd_comment} )

INSERT INTO TBL_CONTENT_DISCUSSION_COMMENT ( UCDC_CODE, UCDC_UCD_CODE, UCDC_UIS_CODE, UCDC_UM_CODE, UCDC_TYPE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UCD',LPAD(#{ucdc_code},18,'0')), #{ucdc_ucd_code}, #{uis_code}, #{ucdc_um_code}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT UCDC_CODE AS ucdc_code , UCDC_UCD_CODE AS ucdc_ucd_code , UCDC_UM_CODE AS ucdc_um_code , UCDC_TYPE AS ucdc_type , UCDC_CONTENT AS ucdc_content , DATE_FORMAT(UCDC_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS ucdc_regdate FROM TBL_CONTENT_DISCUSSION_COMMENT WHERE UCDC_UCD_CODE = #{ucdc_ucd_code} AND UCDC_UM_CODE = #{ucdc_um_code}

SELECT prohibition.UPW_NO AS upw_no , prohibition.UPW_LIST AS upw_list , prohibition.UPW_AM_USERID AS upw_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(prohibition.UPW_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS upw_regdate FROM TBL_PROHIBITION prohibition WHERE prohibition.UPW_NO = 1
